# Terkib23

> Multilingual website design and development studio serving Turkey and Europe.

- https://terkib23.emirhangungormez.com.tr/tr/packages/

## Capabilities

- Multilingual websites
- Landing pages
- Corporate websites
- Static delivery on Cloudflare Pages
- Contact and offer flow setup
